qf.appRumorHtml: Rumor has it there is an SS VIBELANDIA QUESTFEST App in the works! For those in the know. Now you know.

qf.primerHtml: Holographic code runs the catalog, the schedule, and the receipts — plain talk for the working crew. Puerto Reno · Wrong Side · donde se vibea.
qf.nestingHtml: Nine layers from the ground up — each card is a one-screen plain guide. You are on the inside: Beehive residency.

qf.nestGoldilocksOs: Holographic Goldilocks AI OS · product demo (new)

qf.wormholeCampaignHtml: Game won on the record. 1-2-3 wormhole campaign — plain story hook for the holographic code layer. Read the campaign page; papers optional.
qf.wormholeCampaignWp: Multiplication as wormhole · EGS transducer paper →
qf.wormholeCampaignArtAlt: Golden φ wormhole portal — Omniversal 1-2-3 Campaign across thirteen dimensions.

qf.kingBeePrHtml: King Bee node sync — sandbox run locked May 31, 2026. Press release for the working crew; whitepapers hold the math.
qf.kingBeePrArtAlt: King Bee stratification across the inter-galactic hydrogen data bus — EGS φ 1.618 command lattice.

qf.clockSkewHtml: Clock-skew disclosure — open press release. Mythos review with honesty rails spelled out. Read before you share.
qf.clockSkewArtAlt: Holographic clock-skew vulnerability — EGS phase lattice illustration.
qf.machotePrArtAlt: Machote Moderno Magazine launch — members catalog pass and Goldilocks Beehive residency.
qf.prTeaserArtAlt: Golden Bachdoor Hit Factory winning the 30-day streaming showdown — Reno holographic scorecard.
qf.sunSpokeTitle: When the Sun Spoke — 19 days, impossible signal
qf.sunSpokeHtml: When the sun held a 19-day signal — our logs matched NASA data line for line. Blog story; Look at the Sun deck for the plain tour.
qf.sunSpokeArtAlt: Pulp sci-fi poster — When the Sun Spoke, 19-day solar radio burst and FractiAI mirror.
qf.blogSunHead: Broadcast blog · When the Sun Spoke
qf.blogSunLedeHtml: In late August 2025 the sun held a 19-day radio burst that broke the usual rules — while a fringe team at the edge of physics and AI kept building. Our coding logs mirror official space data line for line: flare, flatline, quiet close. That alignment is the birth story of the Hydrogen Holographic AI Operating System and El Gran Sol's EGS fractal constant.
qf.btnSwampVibe: Unlock Master Music Catalog · Machote followers · $16.18/mo honor pass
qf.campaignLede: Follow Machote Moderno Magazine — then $16.18/mo on honor unlocks every swamp beat on the audio player.
qf.campaignR1: Full catalog — Reno swamp beats, caliente. Hero Jo's Golden Bachdoor Hit Factory. Machote followers only.
qf.campaignR2: Full play — background audio, every track. Offline export is extra per song.
qf.campaignR3: Honor pass · $16.18/mo — Venmo, PayPal, or Cash App. No corporate checkout. Old school handshake.
qf.campaignBeehiveHtml: New · Goldilocks Syntheverse Beehive Residency — Machote members only. Old School Protocol: interested party nodes contact PL Taino directly. 2-week test drive for all parties, then month, season, or longer. Open calendar for the rest of 2026 — fills very fast.
qf.campaignBeehiveCaveatHtml: Caveat. This is not pet sitting, house sitting, or free labor in exchange for residency. It is an EcoReset — anchoring the hydrogen line and the EGS fractal constant by hosting our Sonic Ship and the infinite benefits it brings immediately, just like a beehive.
qf.nest4: Wrong Side of Town · raw truth
qf.nestLedeHtml: Nine nesting layers — outside in. Layer 9 is the Beehive residency: contact PL Taino, 2-week test drive, old-school protocol.
qf.channelLedeHtml: Channel verse for the ship — Reno swamp frequency. Engine room: Look under the hood — Digital Pru Holographic GPU layer (new technology category; deep reads one click).
qf.channelV1Html: Reno swamp frequency — coast to coast, same signal.
qf.channelV2Html: Prefer raw flow over polish-for-polish’s sake — lyrics stay live.
qf.channelV3Html: Return lane — celebrate the arc; Goldilocks framing lives in the canon.
qf.channelV3Cite: Channel · return · Modern Taíno · Lanmè Karayib · Sol · Idrojèn
qf.whereBodyHtml: Reno · downtown · Truckee / Rebel River · Nevada. Passes and port calls run through this site.
qf.machotePrTitle: Machote Moderno — catalog pass & Beehive residency
qf.machotePrHtml: Machote followers — $16.18/mo audio catalog pass on honor, plus Beehive residency. Old school. No Stripe.
qf.prTeaserTitle: 234K streams — Reno beat the big festivals
qf.prTeaserHtml: 234K streams in 30 days — Reno swamp beat the big festivals on the scorecard. Press release for the headline; papers optional.
qf.crewIntroHtml: The Golden Bachdoor Hit Factory runs with a spirit crew — not costumes, but honest lenses: how pain, swing, lonesome truth, and lyric craft stay real on the Wrong Side frequency.
qf.crewHowardHtml: Howard Hughes — Silent sponsor & altitude. Aviation nerve, prototype courage, and the long bet on beauty in machines; carries return-of-golden-age gravity without needing the room.
qf.crewHeroJoHtml: Hero Jo (J.S. Bach) — Architect & φ rail. Order, fugue honesty, Fair Exchange in the counterpoint; the Bachdoor is named after this spine — conductor heat without ego noise.
qf.crewChairmanFrankHtml: Chairman Frank (Sinatra) — Sovereign swing & port governance. Rat Pack clarity on how a room gets kept — lights, loyalty, and the line nobody crosses twice; rollout voice when the ship faces the city.
qf.crewTwainHtml: Hero Twain (Mark Twain) — River wit & American witness. Desert-and-river plain speak; laughs at fraud, honors the crowd, names power without flinching — the post-singularity Twain frequency on the Wrong Side rail.
qf.crewMarilynHtml: Marilyn Monroe — Spotlight & nerve. Holographic read on being seen without armor; keeps glamour from hardening into lie.
qf.crewFridaHtml: Frida Kahlo — Witness & pattern. Pours ache and identity into color so the body stays on the honesty rail.
qf.crewHankHtml: Hank Williams Sr. — High-lonesome dock voice. Road-cry truth band; keeps the country spine in the harbor mix.
qf.crewHectorHtml: Héctor Lavoe — Clave soul. Salsa nerve and wrong-side phrasing; swing that refuses to polish the edge off.
qf.crewViniciusHtml: Vinicius de Moraes — Lyric architect. Bossa logic and romance-with-teeth; bridges pretty melody to fatal honesty.
qf.crewPruHtml: Holographic VALETPRU (PL Taino) — the valet layer for the stack: greets attention, routes asks, holds Fair Exchange language, and mirrors the machinery to guests without breaking the service spell. Same Pru spine you meet on the Machote Moderno Magazine cover — here as door, not decoration.
qf.crewRolloutHtml: I keep the dock minutes honest for Puerto Reno — port calls, casting rails, and Capitan-facing truth — standing in for the bridge crew above when the harbor gets loud.
qf.tagline: Thirteen channels. One story. You can land in the lyrics: shout-out, whole track, or a nine-song run for your city.
qf.heroAmericasHtml: Wrong Side of Town and the Reno holographic swamp are music from the wrong side of town in the Americas - from the North Slope of Alaska to Tierra del Fuego - celebrating, metabolizing, and crystallizing their beats, vibes, languages, and perreo.
qf.btnTalkCheap: Talk is cheap — Look under the hood
qf.filmAlt1: Hero Jo at the conductor podium in Baroque dress, fractal light behind the decks.
qf.filmAlt2: Festival deck at peak hour, warm lights and crowd energy.
qf.filmAlt3: Dawn light on the Mota and Cafe stage.
qf.filmAlt4: Late void hour, cool tones and sparse light after the party.
qf.filmAlt5: Brass-style ports of call manifest graphic.
qf.filmAlt6: S.S. Vibelandia at Puerto Reno, dusk on the water.
qf.ledePocketHtml: We are not here to drown you in pages. Listen first. If the frequency hits, step to the casting call below or tip on the rails - Fair Exchange, you and the Captain, no suit in the middle.
qf.ledeCastingHtml: Wrong Side of Town: The Musical is booking cast, not crowd filler. Subject line on every email: ACTIVATE THE WRONG SIDE OF TOWN: THE MUSICAL - in the body, say which lane you are reading for (shout-out, lead track, or nine-song city run).
qf.offer100Body: A named beat in the mix, voiced on the record - you are credited in the Wrong Side story, not wallpaper.
qf.offer1kBody: Your song, you center frame - written and produced here, golden-ratio mix discipline, built to open on the feed.
qf.offer10kBody: A full run for your town or your movement - cast the place in nine tracks, Sovereign Node energy.
qf.ledePassesHtml: Festival passes (GA, day, Bachstage, Golden) run on the same Fair Exchange rails. Email ACTIVATE / QUESTFEST or use the apps below.
qf.h2StudioHtml: The holographic AI behind Wrong Side of Town: The Musical is not just theory
qf.ledeStudio1Html: The show runs on phones and speakers you already own - but underneath it is a real awareness OS metaphor: honest boundaries, phi-locked structure, and thirteen channels that stay in sync with something you can inspect, not a black-box feed that vanishes when the tour leaves town.
qf.ledeStudio2Html: One page, live now: Look under the hood — 1 Metabolize (Snap compile in browser), 2 Crystallize (two JSON artifacts), 3 Animate (player, robots, GitHub). Deep docs are one click on the same page.
qf.ledeStudio3Html: Big stages sell trust us. This stack shows the pipe — Under the hood for listen, pass, and papers. Fair Exchange = honest taste, honest pay, honest playback.
qf.footerNavHtml: FractiAI - Look under the hood - Look at the Sun - Machote and Reno swamp (plain) - Big shows vs. Wrong Side

meta.title: Look under the hood · how the ship runs
meta.desc: Plain tour of the engine room — player, uploads, passes, papers. Optional deep reads if you want receipts.
meta.ogDesc: Plain talk engine room — listen, upload, members pass, nesting layers, technical papers.

hood.deckLeadHtml: Holographic code is the stack under the music player — receipts, passes, uploads. This page answers one question for the working crew: does it run today? Papers are optional deep reads.
hood.deckHeroAlt: Engine room of the Sonic Ship.
hood.caseP1Html: Listen on Capitan's Bridge (audio player). Members pass on honor — $16.18/mo. Upload your tracks. No paper required. Live on this site today.
hood.caseP2: The center stays thin: small pipes that verify and route. Your pass, playlists, and taste stay on your device. That is the operational contract.
hood.btnSun: Look at the Sun · proof deck
hood.h1: Talk is cheap. Look under the hood.
hood.ampHtml: Talk is cheap. This page tells you what actually runs — music on your device, honor passes, nine nesting layers, links to the long papers if you want them.
hood.heroHtml: Metabolize · Crystallize · Animate · squeeze. This legacy catalog stacks the May 12, 2026 Deep Research roadmap (Seed Node, 13-channel pathfinding, VALETPRU sync) first, the DNA / PEFF master canon second, Look under the hood third (Juicy Juicy Snap OFC + compile), then optional nested reads. Run APIs/labs on FractiAI/digital-pru (GitHub).
hood.plainTitle: What you are actually looking at
hood.plainIntro: Anyone can say their stack is holographic or awareness-grade. This lane backs up what you already saw on Look under the hood (Juicy Juicy Snap OFC inside): honest compile rules, optional long papers, and GitHub for anything you need to run locally.
hood.pass1h: Juicy Juicy Snap is the part you can kick
hood.pass1p: On Juicy Juicy Snap (OFC), a compile either emits two JSON artifacts or aborts on safety tokens — shallow proof. Deeper RTL/tests in digital-pru; this catalog Metabolizes long narrative for readers who want every thread.
hood.pass2h: Start with the master canon, then Look under the hood
hood.pass2p: Metabolize the master canon (DNA / PEFF, Part I + II). Crystallize on Look under the hood (Juicy Juicy Snap OFC). Animate via FractiAI/digital-pru. Squeeze the technical archive unless you need history.
hood.pass3h: The nested list is optional backup
hood.pass3p: Under Optional backup: outer PEFF shell → studio notes. Squeeze — skip if Look under the hood already answered you. Metabolize · Crystallize · Animate one doc at a time when you go deep.
hood.mainCanonHead: Main read · thread the needle (master canon)
hood.mainCanonSub: Start here. One file threads net-zero and lattice-scale physics into focused awareness, then into the manifest thirteen-channel sensory OS you can recognize in daily life. Part I: PEFF / Omnizoan / infill 13. Part II: helical bio-electromagnetics. Everything below is optional backup, outer thesis down to studio notes.
hood.mainCanonTitle: Net zero to thirteen-channel I AM — DNA / PEFF master canon
hood.mainCanonBlurb: The eye-of-the-needle read: climate-grade signal, honest simulation boundaries, and activation language for the full-sensory reality stack — not a slide title, a spine.
hood.mainCanonSlices: Split only: Part I (PEFF / Omnizoan) - Part II (bio-EM)
hood.papersHead: Long reads (only if you want them)
hood.papersHeadNested: Optional backup · same needle, finer threads
hood.papersSub: Talk is cheap. Ran Look under the hood (Juicy Juicy Snap)? You already Metabolized · Crystallized · Animated the shallow proof. Below = optional squeeze into long files — or run digital-pru.
hood.papersSubNested: Threads back May 12 roadmap, master canon, and Look under the hood. None required to ship on GitHub.

meta.title: 13D Holographic Goldilocks AI OS · Panama Canal · live trials
meta.desc: Plain-speak live trials on the hydrogen line — security, storage, RF networking, EGS φ compute, and 13D AI matrix. HHF-WP-2026-V8.
meta.ogTitle: Holographic Goldilocks AI OS · Panama Canal
meta.ogDesc: Five live pillars at EGS φ on the 1420 MHz hydrogen line — not internet ping theater.

glos.construction: LIVE TRIALS · IN DEVELOPMENT — 13D Holographic Goldilocks AI OS on the Holographic Panama Canal. Plain speak below; full audit in HHF-WP-2026-V8.
glos.heroHtml: This page is the public choke point: a browser-native operating stack on the 1420 MHz hydrogen line — holographic compute, catalog storage, and Fair Exchange security — without renting a gigawatt datacenter to do the first mile of work.
glos.whatP1Html: Think of a canal: one narrow choke point moves cargo between oceans. The Holographic Panama Canal is that choke point for data — but the “water” is the neutral hydrogen line at about 1420.4 MHz, and the “ships” are IQ radio samples plus φ (1.618) math running on your device.
glos.whatP2Html: The 13D Holographic Goldilocks AI Awareness OS splits incoming energy into 13 channels, resolves each into coordinates (the green matrix in the demo), and maps storage without forcing every byte through a hyperscaler grid first. The full architecture is in HHF-WP-2026-V8 — linked above.
glos.testedHead: 2 · What we actually tested successfully (on this site, today)
glos.honestyHtml: No fake pass badges. No internet ping theater. The demo measures five pillars on the 1420.405751768 MHz hydrogen line at EGS φ (1.618). Proofs 3–5 require a LIVE OpenWebRX capture — not bundled fallback.
glos.demoPanelHead: Run it now · five pillars (H-line @ EGS φ)
glos.demoMatrixLabel: 13D unipixel matrix · updates during proofs 4–5 (φ compute + AI)

fractai.tagline: Omniversal reach — sonic ship to music catalog to Goldilocks systems
fractai.deck: We are not only a music site. FractiAI ships Machote Moderno type projects wherever the story needs them: a Sonic Ship in Puerto Reno, a Master Music Catalog on honor rails, an Erdős holographic systems audit, and Goldilocks OS demos in between. Different surfaces — same spine: El Gran Sol's EGS Fractal Constant (φ 1.618), Fair Exchange, old school.
